title: Two-barrier stress test (start + done) is the right design and must be defended
description: The stress test uses two barriers: start_barrier (no sends until all N clients have DirectoryList) and done_barrier (no drain until all sends complete). The start_barrier was added after the first run showed 3 missing messages because low-jitter clients sent before all N clients were connected. A future contributor may suggest simplifying to one barrier or using a fixed sleep. Do not do that: the two-barrier design makes the test assertion exact (received == sent*(N-1)) without any timing dependency. The done_barrier prevents boundary races where a late message arrives after the drain window closes. Both barriers are load-bearing.
